case_title: FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP A CALIFORNIA VS. PHILLIP KIMBALL ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP HEARING SET FOR OCT-17-2016 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 501

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT WONG, TIN YI AN INDIVIDUAL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $161.66 PER DAY (DAILY RENTAL VALUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-27-2026.

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT KIMBALL, PHILIP (SUED AS PHILLIP KIMBALL) ORDER SETTING HEARING FOR SEP-07-2016 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

ANSWER TO COMPLAINT ***INVALIDATED AS TO DEFENDANT PHILIP KIMBALL. SEE ORDER STRIKING FILING FOR FAILURE TO PAY COURT FEES ENTERED ON 9/29/16.*** FILED BY DEFENDANT CASTANEDA, JOHN AN INDIVIDUAL WONG, TIN YI AN INDIVIDUAL KIMBALL, PHILIP (SUED AS PHILLIP KIMBALL)
FEE PD FOR BY PLAINTIFF FOR DENIAL OF FEE WAIVER AND STRIKING OF ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT KIMBALL, PHILIP (SUED AS PHILLIP KIMBALL)
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP

ORDER GRANTING EX PARTE APPLICATION OF PLAINTIFF FOR AN ORDER ENTERING JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION, BACK RENT AND ATTORNEYS FEES PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND STIPULATION (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KIMBALL, PHILLIP AN INDIVIDUAL CASTANEDA, JOHN AN INDIVIDUAL WONG, TIN YI AN INDIVIDUAL

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT KIMBALL, PHILLIP AN INDIVIDUAL CASTANEDA, JOHN AN INDIVIDUAL WONG, TIN YI AN INDIVIDUAL

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT KIMBALL, PHILLIP AN INDIVIDUAL CASTANEDA, JOHN AN INDIVIDUAL WONG, TIN YI AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON SEP-07-2016 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT PHILIP KIMBALL'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: SUZANNE R. BOLANOS; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT KIMBALL, PHILIP (SUED AS PHILLIP KIMBALL)

STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT CASTANEDA, JOHN AN INDIVIDUAL WONG, TIN YI AN INDIVIDUAL KIMBALL, PHILIP (SUED AS PHILLIP KIMBALL)
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ENTERING JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION, BACK RENT AND ATTORNEY FEES PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND STIPULATION, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT CASTANEDA, JOHN AN INDIVIDUAL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
FEES NOT PAID. FILING OF ANSWER BY DEFENDANT PHILIP KIMBALL ON 8/26/16 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIMBALL, PHILLIP AN INDIVIDUAL CASTANEDA, JOHN AN INDIVIDUAL WONG, TIN YI AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1545 EDDY STREET #432 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94115 $20,347.75 RENT, $2,800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,147.75, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT
